title: Iran war: Trump says he's not worried about domestic terror attack
summary_full: President Donald Trump said oil companies should send tankers through the Strait of Hormuz, which has remained effectively closed due to the war on Iran.
summary_public: President Donald Trump said oil companies should send tankers through the Strait of Hormuz, which has remained effectively closed due to the war on Iran.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: war on Iran. ... Strait of Hormuz, which has remained effectively closed
